input.description: Artist-owned. Passionate about art. Dedicated to the craft of fine art framing. Committed to keeping it affordable and accessible

body.business_understanding: Simons Fine Art Framing & Gallery is a local gem, combining artistic passion with a commitment to accessible framing solutions.
body.opportunity: There is significant potential to attract local art enthusiasts and families by showcasing your unique framing services and the artistry behind them.
body.website_direction: We envision a streamlined single-page site that highlights your portfolio, emphasizes customer testimonials, and simplifies the inquiry process.
body.google_presence_insight: Your business does not appear to have a fully established Google Business presence yet. Aligning that with your website can improve local discovery.
body.next_step: In the next phase, we will refine your offerings and enhance the booking process to drive more inquiries.
